---
title: "E(3) - Equivariant Network for 3D Point Cloud Classification"
date: 2026-05-27
categories: [GDL]
---

{{< include README.qmd >}}

---

- [Project Notebook (Code)](https://github.com/shreeshb51/shreeshb51.github.io/blob/main/projects/E(3)%20-%20Equivariant%20Network%20for%203D%20Point%20Cloud%20Classification/project_3_e3_for_3d_point_cloud_classification.ipynb)

- [Solving an Anchor Example](solving_anchor_example.md)

---
